calendar.matters:
MOTION To Dismiss Action; Supporting Declaration Of David L. Barch; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Proposed Order
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David L. Barch of HOWARD ROME MARTIN & RIDLEY LLP (650-365-7715), appearing for defendant / moving party Imo Industries Inc.
Brendan J. Tuohy of K&L GATES LLP (415-249-1077), appearing for joinder / moving party Crane Co.

RULING:
DEFENDANT IMO INDUSTRIES INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION

No appearance on behalf of plaintiff George Couris and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Imo Industries Inc.'s motion to dismiss entire action pursuant to C.C.P. 583.310 and 583.360 is granted. No opposition filed and more than five years has passed since plaintiff commenced this action. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Joinder To Imo Industries Inc.S Motion To Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
David L. Barch of HOWARD ROME MARTIN & RIDLEY LLP (650-365-7715), appearing for defendant / moving party Imo Industries Inc.
Brendan J. Tuohy of K&L GATES LLP (415-249-1077), appearing for joinder / moving party Crane Co.

RULING:
DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S JOINDER TO IMO INDUSTRIES INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS ACTION

No appearance on behalf of plaintiff George Couris and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Crane Co.'s joinder to Imo Industries Inc.'s motion to dismiss action is off calendar as moot giving the ruling on the underlying motion. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
